final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Demonstrates secure parameter storage and retrieval workflows using AWS Systems Manager (SSM) Parameter Store and Secrets Manager for centralized configuration management in serverless applications. Includes stack-specific namespace for non-sensitive SSM parameters, Secrets Manager secret with generated password, IAM role with least-privilege policies, Lambda function for Boto3-based retrieval, and CloudWatch logging.

Parameters:
  NamespacePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: /app/
    Description: Namespace prefix for SSM parameters under the stack (e.g., /app/). The full path will be /StackName/app/.

Resources:
  ConfigParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}${NamespacePrefix}config-value"
      Type: String
      Value: This is A/B

  EnvironmentParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}${NamespacePrefix}environment"
      Type: String
      Value: production

  AppSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-AppSecret"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username":"admin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: password
        PasswordLength: 20
        ExcludeCharacters: '"/@'
        IncludeSpace: false
        RequireEachIncludedType: true

  LogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-DemoFunction"
      RetentionInDays: 14

  LambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRole"
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetParametersByPath
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${AWS::StackName}${NamespacePrefix}*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                  - secretsmanager:DescribeSecret
                  - secretsmanager:BatchGetSecretValue
                Resource: !Ref AppSecret
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-DemoFunction"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-DemoFunction:*"

  DemoFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-DemoFunction"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os
          import logging

          logger = logging.getLogger()
          logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              ssm_client = boto3.client('ssm')
              secrets_client = boto3.client('secretsmanager')

              namespace = os.environ['Namespace']
              secret_arn = os.environ['SecretArn']

              # Path-based SSM parameter retrieval
              params_response = ssm_client.get_parameters_by_path(
                  Path=namespace,
                  Recursive=True,
                  WithDecryption=False
              )
              for param in params_response['Parameters']:
                  logger.info(f"SSM Parameter {param['Name']}: {param['Value']}")

              # Secrets Manager secret retrieval and decryption
              secret_response = secrets_client.get_secret_value(SecretId=secret_arn)
              secret_dict = json.loads(secret_response['SecretString'])
              logger.info(f"Secret Username: {secret_dict['username']}")
              logger.info(f"Secret Password: {secret_dict['password']}")

              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Parameters and secret retrieved successfully!')
              }
      Environment:
        Variables:
          Namespace: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}${NamespacePrefix}"
          SecretArn: !Ref AppSecret
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128

Outputs:
  Namespace:
    Description: Stack-specific SSM namespace path used for parameters
    Value: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}${NamespacePrefix}"
  ConfigParamName:
    Description: Name of the SSM config parameter
    Value: !Ref ConfigParam
  EnvironmentParamName:
    Description: Name of the SSM environment parameter
    Value: !Ref EnvironmentParam
  SecretArn:
    Description: ARN of the Secrets Manager secret
    Value: !Ref AppSecret
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt DemoFunction.Arn
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda function
    Value: !Ref DemoFunction
  LogGroupName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Log Group
    Value: !Ref LogGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EFS with cross-AZ EC2 instances, performance monitoring, shared storage'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0b2bba8a5d03e8909
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0d6d6d6d6d6d6d6d6
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0e86e20dae922b68f

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 172.31.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 172.31.0.0/20
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-subnet-a'

  SubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 172.31.32.0/20
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-subnet-b'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nacl'

  NetworkAclInboundAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNo: 100
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: false

  NetworkAclOutboundAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNo: 100
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: true

  NetworkAclSubnetAAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetA
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl

  NetworkAclSubnetBAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetB
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl

  EFS:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Encrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: alias/aws/efs
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-efs'

  EFSClientSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: EFS Client access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-efs-client-sg'

  MountTargetSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: EFS Mount Target access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EFSClientSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-mount-target-sg'

  MountTargetA:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFS
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetA
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref MountTargetSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MountTargetA'

  MountTargetB:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFS
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetB
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref MountTargetSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MountTargetB'

  EC2EFSRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EFSAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - elasticfilesystem:ClientRootAccess
                  - elasticfilesystem:ClientWrite
                  - elasticfilesystem:ClientMount
                  - elasticfilesystem:DescribeMountTargets
                  - elasticfilesystem:DescribeFileSystems
                Resource: !GetAtt EFS.FileSystemId
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssmmessages:*
                  - ssm:UpdateInstanceInformation
                  - ec2messages:*
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-efs-role'

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2EFSRole

  EC2InstanceA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT1H
        Count: 1
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetA
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EFSClientSecurityGroup
      DisableApiTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y amazon-efs-utils
          sudo mv /home /home.orig || true
          sudo mkdir /home
          sudo chmod 755 /home
          elapsed=0
          until nc -z ${MountTargetA.IpAddress} 2049; do
            sleep 10
            elapsed=$((elapsed + 10))
            if [ $elapsed -ge 3600 ]; then
              echo "Timeout waiting for mount target"
              /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 -r "Mount target timeout" ${AWS::StackId}
              exit 1
            fi
          done
          sudo mount -t efs -o tls,iam ${EFS}:/ /home
          if [ -d /home.orig ]; then
            sudo cp -a /home.orig/. /home/ 2>/dev/null || true
            sudo rm -rf /home.orig
          fi
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 -r "EFS mounted successfully" ${AWS::StackId}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceA'

  EC2InstanceB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT1H
        Count: 1
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetB
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EFSClientSecurityGroup
      DisableApiTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y amazon-efs-utils
          sudo mv /home /home.orig || true
          sudo mkdir /home
          sudo chmod 755 /home
          elapsed=0
          until nc -z ${MountTargetB.IpAddress} 2049; do
            sleep 10
            elapsed=$((elapsed + 10))
            if [ $elapsed -ge 3600 ]; then
              echo "Timeout waiting for mount target"
              /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 -r "Mount target timeout" ${AWS::StackId}
              exit 1
            fi
          done
          sudo mount -t efs -o tls,iam ${EFS}:/ /home
          if [ -d /home.orig ]; then
            sudo cp -a /home.orig/. /home/ 2>/dev/null || true
            sudo rm -rf /home.orig
          fi
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 -r "EFS mounted successfully" ${AWS::StackId}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceB'

  PercentIOLimitAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::MetricAlarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFS-PercentIOLimit'
      AlarmDescription: 'Alarm when EFS I/O limit exceeds 95%'
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: PercentIOLimit
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFS
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 3
      Threshold: 95
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      DatapointsToAlarm: 3
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PercentIOLimitAlarm'

  ThroughputUtilizationAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::MetricAlarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFS-ThroughputUtilization'
      AlarmDescription: 'Alarm when EFS throughput utilization exceeds 80%'
      MetricName: ThroughputUtilization
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFS
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 5
      Threshold: 80
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      DatapointsToAlarm: 4
      Metrics:
        - Id: utilization
          Expression: '100*m1/m2'
          Label: ThroughputUtilization
          ReturnData: true
        - Id: m1
          MetricStat:
            Metric:
              Namespace: AWS/EFS
              Name: MeteredThroughput
              Dimensions:
                - Name: FileSystemId
                  Value: !Ref EFS
            Period: 300
            Stat: Average
        - Id: m2
          MetricStat:
            Metric:
              Namespace: AWS/EFS
              Name: PermittedThroughput
              Dimensions:
                - Name: FileSystemId
                  Value: !Ref EFS
            Period: 300
            Stat: Average
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ThroughputUtilizationAlarm'

Outputs:
  EFSFileSystemId:
    Description: EFS File System ID
    Value: !Ref EFS
  MountTargetADnsName:
    Description: DNS name of Mount Target A
    Value: !GetAtt MountTargetA.MountTargetDnsName
  MountTargetBDnsName:
    Description: DNS name of Mount Target B
    Value: !GetAtt MountTargetB.MountTargetDnsName
  EC2InstanceAId:
    Description: Instance ID of EC2InstanceA for SSM access
    Value: !Ref EC2InstanceA
  EC2InstanceBId:
    Description: Instance ID of EC2InstanceB for SSM access
    Value: !Ref EC2InstanceB

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Mappings:
  AWSRegionToAMI:
    us-east-1:
      AL2023: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AL2023: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    us-west-2:
      AL2023: ami-0d082f32c979e8921
    eu-west-1:
      AL2023: ami-0a5f3554161f2b2e8
    ap-southeast-1:
      AL2023: ami-0b2af8e8c5b6a5f3c
    ap-northeast-1:
      AL2023: ami-0d3c1a5d8b3f4e2a1

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-igw"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-1"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-2"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-1"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-2"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-rt"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  EIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-nat-eip-1"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-nat-eip-2"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  NatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP1.AllocationId
    DependsOn: EIP1
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-nat-1"
      - Key: Stack
        Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  NatGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP2.AllocationId
    DependsOn: EIP2
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-nat-2"
      - Key: Stack
        Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-rt-1"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-rt-2"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

  DBSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username":"etherpad"}'
        GenerateStringKey: password
        PasswordLength: 30
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
        IncludeSpace: false
        IncludeSymbols: true
        ExcludeCharacters: '"/@\\'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-dbsecret"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub "${AWS::StackName} DB subnet group"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  RDSSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: RDS Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SG
      Egress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.35
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageType: gp3
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSG
      MasterUserSecret:
        Ref: DBSecret
      DBName: etherpad
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      MultiAZ: false
      StorageEncrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  DBEndpointParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/db-endpoint"
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Address

  DBPortParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/db-port"
      Type: Number
      Value: 3306

  DBNameParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/db-name"
      Type: String
      Value: etherpad

  DBSecretArnParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/db-secret-arn"
      Type: SecureString
      Value: !Ref DBSecret

  ArtifactBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-codedeploy-artifacts"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ALBSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: ALB Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 9001
          ToPort: 9001
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-alb-sg"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EC2SG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: EC2 Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 9001
          ToPort: 9001
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSG
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref RDSSG
        - IpProtocol: -1
          FromPort: -1
          ToPort: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ec2-sg"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ec2-inline"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                Resource: !GetAtt DBSecret.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                  - ssm:GetParameters
                  - ssm:DescribeParameters
                Resource: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${AWS::StackName}/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ArtifactBucket}/*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [AWSRegionToAMI, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AL2023]
        InstanceType: t3.small
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref EC2SG
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            dnf update -y
            dnf install -y amazon-cfn-bootstrap awscli jq
            dnf module install -y nodejs:20
            curl "https://aws-codedeploy-${AWS::Region}.s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/latest/install" | bash
            systemctl enable codedeploy-agent
            systemctl start codedeploy-agent
            mkdir -p /opt/etherpad
            DB_ENDPOINT=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name "/${AWS::StackName}/db-endpoint" --query Parameter.Value --output text --region ${AWS::Region})
            DB_PORT=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name "/${AWS::StackName}/db-port" --query Parameter.Value --output text --region ${AWS::Region})
            DB_NAME=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name "/${AWS::StackName}/db-name" --query Parameter.Value --output text --region ${AWS::Region})
            SECRET_ARN=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name "/${AWS::StackName}/db-secret-arn" --with-decryption --query Parameter.Value --output text --region ${AWS::Region})
            SECRET_JSON=$(aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id ${SECRET_ARN} --query SecretString --output text --region ${AWS::Region})
            USERNAME=$(echo ${SECRET_JSON} | jq -r .username)
            PASSWORD=$(echo ${SECRET_JSON} | jq -r .password)
            cat > /opt/etherpad/settings.json << EOF
            {
              "dbType" : "mysql",
              "dbSettings" : {
                "user"    : "${USERNAME}",
                "password": "${PASSWORD}",
                "host"    : "${DB_ENDPOINT}",
                "port"    : ${DB_PORT},
                "database": "${DB_NAME}"
              },
              "trustProxy" : true,
              "port" : 9001
            }
            EOF
            chmod 644 /opt/etherpad/settings.json
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ASG --region ${AWS::Region}
    Tags:
      - Key: Stack
        Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ASG:
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT30M
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '2'
      MaxSize: '4'
      DesiredCapacity: '2'
      TargetGroupARNs:
        - !Ref TargetGroup
      HealthCheckType: ELB
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ec2"
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  CodeDeployServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: codedeploy.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
        Version: '2012-10-17'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-codedeploy-service"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - codedeploy:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - autoscaling:CompleteLifecycleAction
                  - autoscaling:DeleteAutoScalingGroup
                  - autoscaling:DescribeAutoScalingGroups
                  - autoscaling:DescribeAutoScalingInstances
                  - autoscaling:DescribeLifecycleHooks
                  - autoscaling:DescribePolicies
                  - autoscaling:DescribeScalingActivities
                  - autoscaling:DescribeTags
                  - autoscaling:PutLifecycleHook
                  - autoscaling:RecordLifecycleActionHeartbeat
                  - autoscaling:UpdateAutoScalingGroup
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - elasticloadbalancing:DescribeTargetGroups
                  - elasticloadbalancing:DescribeListeners
                  - elasticloadbalancing:ModifyListener
                  - elasticloadbalancing:ModifyRule
                  - elasticloadbalancing:ModifyTargetGroup
                  - elasticloadbalancing:ModifyTargetGroupAttributes
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-tg"
      Port: 9001
      Protocol: HTTP
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      TargetType: instance
      HealthCheckPath: /
      HealthCheckIntervalSeconds: 30
      HealthyThresholdCount: 5
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-alb"
      Scheme: internet-facing
      Type: application
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSG
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  Listener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ALB
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: forward
          TargetGroupArn: !Ref TargetGroup

  CodeDeployApp:
    Type: AWS::CodeDeploy::Application
    Properties:
      ComputePlatform: Server
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  DeploymentGroup:
    Type: AWS::CodeDeploy::DeploymentGroup
    Properties:
      ApplicationName: !Ref CodeDeployApp
      DeploymentGroupName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-asg-dg"
      ServiceRoleArn: !GetAtt CodeDeployServiceRole.Arn
      DeploymentConfigName: CodeDeployDefault.AllAtOnce
      AutoScalingGroups:
        - !Ref ASG
      LoadBalancerInfo:
        TargetGroupInfo:
          TargetGroupName: !Ref TargetGroup
          ProdTrafficRoute:
            ListenerArns:
              - !Ref Listener
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  ALBDNSName:
    Value: !GetAtt ALB.DNSName
  ASGArn:
    Value: !Ref ASG
  CodeDeployAppArn:
    Value: !Ref CodeDeployApp
  ArtifactBucketName:
    Value: !Ref ArtifactBucket
  DBEndpointParamArn:
    Value: !Ref DBEndpointParam
  DBPortParamArn:
    Value: !Ref DBPortParam
  DBNameParamArn:
    Value: !Ref DBNameParam
  DBSecretArnParamArn:
    Value: !Ref DBSecretArnParam

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
  SampleLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SampleLambda'
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': '"Hello from Lambda sample!"'
              }
      MemorySize: 128
      Timeout: 3
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SampleLambda'
Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Value: !Ref SampleLambda
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Value: !GetAtt SampleLambda.Arn
  LambdaInvokeArn:
    Value: !GetAtt SampleLambda.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates two EC2-trusting IAM roles with read-only IAM access via a shared managed policy.

Resources:
  IamReadOnlyManagedPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: IamReadOnlyManagedPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:Get*
              - iam:List*
            Resource: '*'

  EC2IamReadRole1:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IamReadRole1'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - !Ref IamReadOnlyManagedPolicy

  EC2IamReadInstanceProfile1:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IamReadInstanceProfile1'
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2IamReadRole1

  EC2IamReadRole2:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IamReadRole2'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - !Ref IamReadOnlyManagedPolicy

  EC2IamReadInstanceProfile2:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IamReadInstanceProfile2'
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2IamReadRole2

Outputs:
  Role1Arn:
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IamReadRole1.Arn
  Role2Arn:
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IamReadRole2.Arn
  InstanceProfile1Arn:
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IamReadInstanceProfile1.Arn
  InstanceProfile2Arn:
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IamReadInstanceProfile2.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Isolated MySQL RDS deployment with Provisioned IOPS (io1) in private subnets across AZs.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-${!Select [0, !GetAZs ""]}'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-${!Select [1, !GetAZs ""]}'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-route-table'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet1-rt-assoc'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet2-rt-assoc'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: MySQL RDS placement across AZs
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS MySQL access on port 3306 from VPC
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production

  RDSMasterPassword:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-master-password'
      GenerateSecretString:
        GenerateStringKey: password
        PasswordLength: 60
        ExcludeCharacters: '"/\\'
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-master-password'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production

  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-mysql'
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: '8.0.45'
      DBInstanceClass: db.r6i.large
      MasterUsername: admin
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub '{{resolve:secretsmanager:${RDSMasterPassword}:SecretString:password}}'
      DBName: mydb
      AllocatedStorage: 100
      StorageType: io1
      Iops: 3000
      StorageEncrypted: true
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      MultiAZ: false
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-mysql'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production

Outputs:
  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: RDS MySQL endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Address
  RDSPort:
    Description: RDS MySQL port
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Port
  SecretArn:
    Description: Secrets Manager secret ARN for master password
    Value: !GetAtt RDSMasterPassword.Arn
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID for the isolated network
    Value: !Ref VPC

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for MySQL RDS instance (db.t3.small) with automated snapshots and basic public VPC networking infrastructure across two AZs.'

Parameters:
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin'
  MasterUserPassword:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: '{{resolve:ssm-secure:/rds/mysql/password:1}}'
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'mydb'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc-gw-attach'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: 'Production'

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-${AWS::Region}1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-${AWS::Region}2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  Subnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub 'DB Subnet Group for ${AWS::StackName}'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for RDS MySQL instance allowing inbound 3306 from anywhere'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          FromPort: -1
          ToPort: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'

  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds'
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.small
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: '8.0.45'
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserPassword: !Ref MasterUserPassword
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageType: gp2
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      StorageEncrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'

Outputs:
  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: 'MySQL RDS Endpoint'
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Address
  VPCId:
    Description: 'VPC ID'
    Value: !Ref VPC
  SubnetIds:
    Description: 'Public Subnet IDs'
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure MySQL RDS with VPC, NAT, Secrets Manager

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  GatewayAtt:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-a'

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-b'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InternetGatewayRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  NatEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nat-eip'

  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP.AllocationId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nat'

  NatGatewayRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-subnet-group'
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnets for RDS
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetA
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-subnet-group'

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS MySQL access
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg'

  DBParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      DBParameterGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-param-group'
      Family: mysql8.0
      Description: Custom MySQL 8.0 parameter group
      Parameters: {}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-param-group'

  RDSSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-secret'
      Description: RDS admin credentials
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username":"admin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: password
        PasswordLength: 20
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
        ExcludeCharacters: '"\/[]'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-secret'

  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db'
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      Engine: mysql
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageType: gp2
      StorageEncrypted: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DeletionProtection: true
      MultiAZ: false
      MasterUsername: admin
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub '{{resolve:secretsmanager:${RDSSecret}:SecretString:password}}'
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref DBParameterGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db'

Outputs:
  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: RDS Instance Endpoint Address
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address

  RDSSecretArn:
    Description: ARN of the Secrets Manager secret
    Value: !Ref RDSSecret

  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref MyVPC

  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: Private Subnet IDs
    Value:
      - !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      - !Ref PrivateSubnetB

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure S3 buckets for replicas and access logs

Resources:
  ReplicasBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}-replicas-${AWS::Region}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  AccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}-accesslogs-${AWS::Region}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ReplicasBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ReplicasBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ReplicasBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  AccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AccessLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowLoggingFromReplicasBucket
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AccessLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
                's3:x-amz-grant-full-control': emailfriend
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt ReplicasBucket.Arn

Outputs:
  ReplicasBucketName:
    Description: Name of the Replicas Bucket
    Value: !Ref ReplicasBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ReplicasBucketName'
  ReplicasBucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the Replicas Bucket
    Value: !GetAtt ReplicasBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ReplicasBucketArn'
  AccessLogsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the Access Logs Bucket
    Value: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AccessLogsBucketName'
  AccessLogsBucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the Access Logs Bucket
    Value: !GetAtt AccessLogsBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AccessLogsBucketArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  MyBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-s3-trigger-bucket-${AWS::StackName}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:Put
            Function: !GetAtt MyLambdaFunction.Arn
            Filter:
              S3Key:
                Rules:
                  - Name: prefix
                    Value: uploads/
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: S3LambdaTrigger
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: S3LambdaTrigger
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  MyLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-s3-trigger-lambda'
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib.parse

          def handler(event, context):
              print("Received event: " + json.dumps(event, indent=2))
              for record in event['Records']:
                  bucket = record['s3']['bucket']['name']
                  key = urllib.parse.unquote_plus(record['s3']['object']['key'], encoding='utf-8')
                  print(f"Bucket: {bucket}")
                  print(f"Key: {key}")
              return {'statusCode': 200}
      Handler: index.handler
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: S3LambdaTrigger
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref MyLambdaFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: s3.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt MyBucket.Arn
    Tags:
      - Key: Project
        Value: S3LambdaTrigger
      - Key: Stack
        Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref MyBucket
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda function
    Value: !Ref MyLambdaFunction
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt MyLambdaFunction.Arn
  TestCommand:
    Description: To test the trigger, run: aws s3 cp test.txt s3://[BucketName]/uploads/test.txt (replace [BucketName] with actual bucket name)
    Value: !Sub 'aws s3 cp test.txt s3://${MyBucket}/uploads/test.txt'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for an ECR repository with root policy for Kubernetes image management.

Resources:
  ECRRepository:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-kubernetes-repo"
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      RepositoryPolicyText: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid": "RootAccess",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
              },
              "Action": "ecr:*",
              "Condition": {
                "Bool": {
                  "aws:SecureTransport": "true"
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "Kubernetes container image management"

Outputs:
  RepositoryUri:
    Description: URI of the ECR repository
    Value: !GetAtt ECRRepository.RepositoryUri
  RepositoryArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECR repository
    Value: !Ref ECRRepository

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a VPC with two public subnets and one private subnet across two fixed Availability Zones using RegionMap for persistence.'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      '0': us-east-1a
      '1': us-east-1b
    us-east-2:
      '0': us-east-2a
      '1': us-east-2b
    us-west-2:
      '0': us-west-2a
      '1': us-west-2b
    eu-west-1:
      '0': eu-west-1a
      '1': eu-west-1b

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', '0']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-a'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', '1']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-b'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  PrivateSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', '0']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-a'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Description: Public Subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PublicSubnetA, !Ref PublicSubnetB]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetIds'

  PrivateSubnetId:
    Description: Private Subnet ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetId'

  AZA:
    Description: AZ for Subnet A
    Value: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', '0']
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AZA'

  AZB:
    Description: AZ for Subnet B
    Value: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', '1']
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AZB'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AZ1: us-east-1a
      AZ2: us-east-1b
    us-east-2:
      AZ1: us-east-2a
      AZ2: us-east-2b
    us-west-2:
      AZ1: us-west-2a
      AZ2: us-west-2b
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ1]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet-AZ1'
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ1]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet-AZ1'
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ2]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet-AZ2'
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: ID of the public subnet in AZ1
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1Id'
  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Description: ID of the private subnet in AZ1
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1Id'
  PrivateSubnet2Id:
    Description: ID of the private subnet in AZ2
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2Id'
  AZ1:
    Description: Availability Zone 1 used for subnets
    Value: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ1]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AZ1'
  AZ2:
    Description: Availability Zone 2 used for subnets
    Value: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ2]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AZ2'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket with AWS KMS encryption, lifecycle management, KMS key alias, and organizational tags.'

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: Production
    Description: Environment tag value.
  BucketSuffix:
    Type: String
    MinLength: 8
    MaxLength: 8
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9]{8}$'
    Description: 8-character random lowercase alphanumeric suffix for unique bucket naming.

Resources:
  KMSKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for S3 bucket encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable IAM User Permissions'
            Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 service to use key'
            Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-kms-key'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: !Ref Environment

  KMSAlias:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Alias'
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-s3-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KMSKey

  Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${BucketSuffix}'
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KMSKey
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - ID: 'LifecycleRule1'
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 30
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: 90
                StorageClass: GLACIER_INSTANT_RETRIEVAL
            ExpirationInDays: 365
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: 'Owner'
          Value: 'CloudFormation'

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'ForceSSL'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${Bucket}'
              - !Sub '${Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              BoolIfExists:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: 'DenyUnencryptedObjects'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'aws:kms'
          - Sid: 'DenyIncorrectEncryptionKeyObjects'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-kms-key-id': !GetAtt KMSKey.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "S3 bucket with KMS encryption, lifecycle rules, and tagging"

Resources:
  MyKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for S3 bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service use
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: KeyUsage
          Value: S3Encryption
  MyKMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/my-s3-encryption-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref MyKMSKey
  MyBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-my-encrypted-bucket-${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
          SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
          KmsMasterKeyID: !Ref MyKMSAlias
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: MyBucketLifecycleRule
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - Days: 30
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - Days: 90
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: 365
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EncryptedLifecycleBucket
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Owner
          Value: OrganizationTeam

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref MyBucket
  KMSKeyId:
    Description: ID of the KMS key
    Value: !Ref MyKMSKey
  KMSAliasArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key alias
    Value: !Ref MyKMSAlias

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-igw"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-1"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-2"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-1"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-2"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-rt"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  PublicInternetRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-eip"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-nat"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-rt"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
  PrivateNatRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway
Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
  PrivateSubnet2Id:
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
  NatGatewayId:
    Value: !Ref NatGateway
  PublicRouteTableId:
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
