final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'must consist of alphanumeric characters only'
  MasterUserPassword:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: '{{resolve:ssm-secure:/aurora/mysql-password:1}}'
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-attachgw'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: AttachGateway
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-route'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production
  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet1-rta'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production
  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet2-rta'
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  ClusterParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBClusterParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cluster-pg'
      Family: aurora-mysql8.0
      Parameters:
        time_zone: UTC
        sql_mode: ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY,STRICT_TRANS_TABLES,ERROR_FOR_DIVISION_BY_ZERO,NO_AUTO_CREATE_USER,NO_ENGINE_SUBSTITUTION
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cluster-pg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
  InstanceParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-pg'
      Family: aurora-mysql8.0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-pg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
  AuroraSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow inbound 3306 for Aurora from anywhere and all outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-aurora-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  AuroraCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.mysql_aurora_3.05.0
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserPassword: !Ref MasterUserPassword
      DBClusterParameterGroupName: !Ref ClusterParameterGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VpcSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref AuroraSecurityGroup
      StorageEncrypted: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: '03:00-04:00'
      DeletionPolicy: Retain
      UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cluster'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  WriterInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-writer'
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref InstanceParameterGroup
      DeletionPolicy: Retain
      UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-writer'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  ReaderInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-reader'
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref InstanceParameterGroup
      PromoteReadReplica: true
      DeletionPolicy: Retain
      UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-reader'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
Outputs:
  ClusterEndpoint:
    Description: Aurora Cluster Endpoint Address
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.Endpoint.Address
  ReaderEndpoint:
    Description: Aurora Reader Instance Endpoint Address
    Value: !GetAtt ReaderInstance.Endpoint.Address
  WriterInstanceIdentifier:
    Description: Writer DB Instance Identifier
    Value: !Ref WriterInstance
  ReaderInstanceIdentifier:
    Description: Reader DB Instance Identifier
    Value: !Ref ReaderInstance

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a multi-AZ public Aurora MySQL cluster with two db.t3.large instances across two public subnets and error log exports to CloudWatch.

Parameters:
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin'
  MasterUserPassword:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    AllowedPattern: '^[A-Za-z\d@$!%*?&]{8,128}$'
    MinLength: '8'
    MaxLength: '128'
  DatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'mydatabase'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
    Metadata:
      AWS::CloudFormation::Init: {}

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - '0'
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-a'

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - '1'
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-b'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} Aurora DB subnet group'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnetA
        - !Ref PublicSubnetB
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dsg'

  DBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub 'Security group for ${AWS::StackName} Aurora cluster'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-sg'

  AuroraCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cluster'
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      StorageEncrypted: true
      CloudWatchLogsExportConfiguration:
        EnableLogTypes:
          - error
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref DBSecurityGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserPassword: !Ref MasterUserPassword
      DatabaseName: !Ref DatabaseName

  PrimaryDBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-primary'
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - '0'
        - !GetAZs ''
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup

  ReaderDBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-reader'
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - '1'
        - !GetAZs ''
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup

Outputs:
  DBClusterEndpoint:
    Description: Cluster endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.Endpoint.Address
  DBClusterReaderEndpoint:
    Description: Reader endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.ReadEndpoint.Address
  DBSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group ID for the Aurora cluster
    Value: !Ref DBSecurityGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that deploys a simple Node.js 24.x Lambda function that prints hello world to CloudWatch Logs.'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  HelloWorldFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HelloWorldFunction'
      Runtime: nodejs24.x
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
              console.log('hello world');
              return {
                  statusCode: 200,
                  body: JSON.stringify('hello world'),
              };
          };
      Timeout: 3
      MemorySize: 128

Outputs:
  HelloWorldFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Hello World Lambda Function
    Value: !GetAtt HelloWorldFunction.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HelloWorldFunctionArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: The template provides foundational public networking for internet-accessible resources and demos.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  SubnetId:
    Description: Public Subnet ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SubnetId'

  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: Internet Gateway ID

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^$|^o-[a-z0-9]{4,32}$'
    Default: ''
  OrganizationalUnitId:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^$|^ou-[a-z0-9]{4,32}$'
    Default: ''
Conditions:
  UseOrganizationAccess: !Not [!Equals [!Ref OrganizationId, '']]
  UseOrganizationalUnitAccess: !Not [!Equals [!Ref OrganizationalUnitId, '']]
Resources:
  SharedBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName:
        Fn::Lower:
          Fn::Sub: '${AWS::StackName}-shared-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
        - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
            SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
  SharedBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref SharedBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statements:
          - Sid: EnforceTransportSecurity
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${SharedBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${SharedBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowOwnerListBucket
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 's3:ListBucket'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${SharedBucket}'
          - Fn::If:
              - UseOrganizationAccess
              - Sid: AllowOrgListBucket
                Effect: Allow
                Principal:
                  AWS: '*'
                Action:
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${SharedBucket}'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref OrganizationId
              - Ref: AWS::NoValue
          - Fn::If:
              - UseOrganizationAccess
              - Sid: AllowOrgObjectAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Principal:
                  AWS: '*'
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 's3:DeleteObject'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${SharedBucket}/*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref OrganizationId
              - Ref: AWS::NoValue
          - Fn::If:
              - UseOrganizationalUnitAccess
              - Sid: AllowOUListBucket
                Effect: Allow
                Principal:
                  AWS: '*'
                Action:
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${SharedBucket}'
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    'aws:PrincipalOrgPaths': !Sub '/${OrganizationId}/${OrganizationalUnitId}/*'
              - Ref: AWS::NoValue
          - Fn::If:
              - UseOrganizationalUnitAccess
              - Sid: AllowOUObjectAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Principal:
                  AWS: '*'
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 's3:DeleteObject'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${SharedBucket}/*'
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    'aws:PrincipalOrgPaths': !Sub '/${OrganizationId}/${OrganizationalUnitId}/*'
              - Ref: AWS::NoValue
Outputs:
  SharedBucketName:
    Value: !Ref SharedBucket
  SharedBucketArn:
    Value: !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'IAM Role and Instance Profile for EC2 with SSM and CloudWatch integration'

Resources:
  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2SSMRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2-SSM-CloudWatch'
  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile'
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceProfile'
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

Outputs:
  EC2RoleArn:
    Description: 'SSM/CloudWatch EC2 role'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2SSMRole.Arn
  InstanceProfileName:
    Description: 'EC2 attachment'
    Value: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template creating VPC, Security Group, S3 Bucket, and DynamoDB Table with deletion protection.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group with no inbound rules and outbound HTTPS only
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress: []
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-my-unique-bucket-${AWS::StackName}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: '*'
            Resource: !Sub "${S3Bucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-dynamodb-table"
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: partitionKey
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: sortKey
          AttributeType: N
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: partitionKey
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: sortKey
          KeyType: RANGE

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-AZ VPC with two public and two private subnets, NAT Gateways, route tables, and routes to the Internet via IGW for public and NAT for private.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 0
          -
            Fn::GetAZs: !Ref AWS::Region
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 1
          -
            Fn::GetAZs: !Ref AWS::Region
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-2'

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 0
          -
            Fn::GetAZs: !Ref AWS::Region
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-1'

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 1
          -
            Fn::GetAZs: !Ref AWS::Region
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-2'

  EIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-eip-1'

  EIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-eip-2'

  NATGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP1.AllocationId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nat-1'

  NATGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP2.AllocationId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nat-2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt-1'

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt-2'

  PrivateDefaultRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway1

  PrivateDefaultRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway2

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnetIds:
    Value: !Join [', ', [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]
  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Value: !Join [', ', [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2]]
  NATGateway1Arn:
    Value: !Ref NATGateway1
  NATGateway2Arn:
    Value: !Ref NATGateway2

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Demo secure web-based VS Code (code-server) development environment on EC2 Ubuntu 22.04 with CloudFront HTTPS access, caching (1-year TTL), SSM management, restricted to CloudFront IPs.'

Parameters:
  CodeServerVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: '4.22.1'
    Description: 'Code-server version to install'
  CloudFrontCIDRs:
    Type: String
    Default: '13.32.0.0/15,52.84.0.0/15,54.192.0.0/15,54.236.0.0/15,18.164.0.0/15'
    Description: 'Comma-separated CloudFront regional IP ranges'
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: 't3.micro'
    AllowedValues: ['t3.micro', 't3.small']
    Description: 'EC2 instance type'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    Ubuntu2204AMI:
      us-east-1: ami-053b0ca5898909322
      us-east-2: ami-0a5c3558529278c43
      us-west-1: ami-0d527ae8e2f5e6c5f
      us-west-2: ami-0d3e95a2a755c9f2c
      eu-west-1: ami-0e01f0d5d5e7a5d5e
      eu-central-1: ami-0a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h
      ap-southeast-1: ami-0abcdef1234567890
      ap-southeast-2: ami-0fedcba9876543210
      ap-northeast-1: ami-0123456789abcdef0
      # Add more regions as needed for full coverage

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for code-server EC2, inbound 8080 from CloudFront CIDRs only'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [0, !Split [',', !Ref CloudFrontCIDRs]]
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [1, !Split [',', !Ref CloudFrontCIDRs]]
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [2, !Split [',', !Ref CloudFrontCIDRs]]
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [3, !Split [',', !Ref CloudFrontCIDRs]]
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [4, !Split [',', !Ref CloudFrontCIDRs]]
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-code-server-sg'

  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cfn-signal'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: cloudformation:SignalResource
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/${AWS::StackName}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-role'

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-eip'

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', Ubuntu2204AMI]
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-code-server'
    UserData:
      Fn::Base64: !Sub |
        MIME-Version: 1.0
        Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="==BOUNDARY=="

        --==BOUNDARY==
        Content-Type: text/cloud-config; charset="us-ascii"
        #cloud-config
        package_update: true
        package_upgrade: true
        packages:
          - curl
          - wget
          - software-properties-common
          - gpg
          - awscli
          - jq

        runcmd:
          - curl -fsSL https://code-server.dev/install.sh | sh -s -- --method=standalone --version=${CodeServerVersion}
          - mkdir -p /etc/systemd/system/code-server.service.d
          - |
            cat > /etc/systemd/system/code-server.service <<EOF
            [Unit]
            Description=code-server
            After=network.target

            [Service]
            Type=simple
            User=root
            WorkingDirectory=/root
            ExecStart=/usr/lib/code-server/bin/code-server --bind-addr 0.0.0.0:8080 --auth none
            Restart=always
            RestartSec=10

            [Install]
            WantedBy=multi-user.target
            EOF
          - systemctl daemon-reload
          - systemctl enable --now code-server
          - until curl -f http://localhost:8080; do sleep 1; done
          - aws cloudformation signal --stack-name ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2Instance --region ${AWS::Region} --status "SUCCESS"
        --==BOUNDARY==--
    Metadata:
      AWS::CloudFormation::Init:
        configSets:
          default:
            - config: |

  EIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP.AllocationId
    DependsOn: EC2Instance

  LongTTLCachePolicy:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::CachePolicy
    Properties:
      CachePolicyConfig:
        Comment: 'Custom long TTL cache policy (1 year)'
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-long-ttl'
        MinTTL: 0
        DefaultTTL: 31536000
        MaxTTL: 31536000
        Compress: true
        ParametersInCacheKeyAndForwardedToOrigin:
          CookiesConfig:
            CookieBehavior: all
          HeadersConfig:
            HeaderBehavior: allViewer
          QueryStringsConfig:
            QueryStringBehavior: all

  CloudFrontDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    DependsOn: EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Comment: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} code-server via CloudFront'
        Enabled: true
        PriceClass: PriceClass_100
        DefaultRootObject: ''
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: !Sub '${EIP}'
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
            - PUT
            - POST
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
          CachedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
          Compress: true
          CachePolicyId: !Ref LongTTLCachePolicy
        Origins:
          - Id: !Sub '${EIP}'
            DomainName: !GetAtt EIP.PublicIp
            CustomOriginConfig:
              HTTPPort: 8080
              HTTPSPort: 443
              OriginProtocolPolicy: http-only
        Tags:
          - Key: Name
            Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-distribution'

Outputs:
  CloudFrontURL:
    Description: 'CloudFront URL for code-server (https://d123456789.cloudfront.net)'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${CloudFrontDistribution.DomainName}'
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 Instance ID'
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  PublicIP:
    Description: 'EC2 Public IP (stable via EIP)'
    Value: !GetAtt EIP.PublicIp
  InstanceSSMConnect:
    Description: 'SSM Session Manager connect command'
    Value: !Sub 'aws ssm start-session --target i-${EC2Instance}'
  AvailabilityZone:
    Description: 'Instance AZ'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.AvailabilityZone

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Amazon ECS cluster configured with both Fargate and Fargate Spot capacity providers for cost-optimized and reliable scaling.'

Parameters:
  ClusterName:
    Type: String
    Default: cfn-ecs-cluster
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z][a-z0-9\-]*[a-z0-9]$'
    Description: 'Name of the ECS cluster (must match AWS naming conventions).'

Resources:
  ECSCluster:
    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    Properties:
      ClusterName: !Ref ClusterName
      CapacityProviders:
        - FARGATE
        - FARGATE_SPOT
      DefaultCapacityProviderStrategy:
        - CapacityProvider: FARGATE_SPOT
          Weight: 1
        - CapacityProvider: FARGATE
          Base: 1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref ClusterName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  ClusterName:
    Description: The name of the ECS cluster.
    Value: !Ref ECSCluster
  ClusterArn:
    Description: The ARN of the ECS cluster.
    Value: !GetAtt ECSCluster.Arn
  CapacityProviders:
    Description: The configured capacity providers.
    Value: !Join [", ", ["FARGATE", "FARGATE_SPOT"]]

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "ECS Fargate Task Definition for NGINX container with IAM roles for SSM execution and CloudWatch logging"

Resources:
  LogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nginx-logs'
      RetentionInDays: 7
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  TaskExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TaskExecutionRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy

  TaskRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TaskRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SSMExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel
                Resource: '*'

  TaskDefinition:
    Type: AWS::ECS::TaskDefinition
    Properties:
      Family: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nginx-task'
      RequiresCompatibilities:
        - FARGATE
      NetworkMode: awsvpc
      Cpu: '256'
      Memory: '512'
      ExecutionRoleArn: !GetAtt TaskExecutionRole.Arn
      TaskRoleArn: !GetAtt TaskRole.Arn
      ContainerDefinitions:
        - Name: nginx-container
          Image: nginx
          Essential: true
          PortMappings:
            - ContainerPort: 80
              Protocol: tcp
          LogConfiguration:
            LogDriver: awslogs
            Options:
              awslogs-group: !Ref LogGroup
              awslogs-region: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
              awslogs-stream-prefix: ecs

Outputs:
  TaskDefinitionArn:
    Description: "ARN of the ECS Fargate task definition"
    Value: !Ref TaskDefinition
  LogGroupName:
    Description: "Name of the CloudWatch Logs group"
    Value: !Ref LogGroup
  TaskRoleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt TaskRole.Arn
  ExecutionRoleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt TaskExecutionRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation stack for provisioning a Windows Server 2019 EC2 instance with SSM integration for CPU stress testing, including custom SSM document and FIS IAM role.

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: [t3.nano, t3.micro, t3.small, t3.medium, t3.large]
    Default: t3.medium
    Description: EC2 instance type for CPU stress testing.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for CPU stress test instance (SSM outbound only)
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSG'

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2SSMRole'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base}}'
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CpuStressInstance'

  CpuStressDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CpuStressTest'
      DocumentType: Command
      DocumentFormat: YAML
      Content: |
        schemaVersion: '2.2'
        description: 'Custom SSM document to run CPU stress test on Windows instance using PowerShell.'
        parameters:
          - name: DurationMinutes
            type: Integer
            default: 5
            description: 'Duration of CPU stress test in minutes.'
            minValue: 1
            maxValue: 60
        mainSteps:
          - action: aws:runPowerShellScript
            name: runCpuStress
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                |
                $cores = (Get-WmiObject Win32_Processor).NumberOfLogicalProcessors
                $jobs = @()
                for ($i = 0; $i -lt $cores; $i++) {
                  $jobs += Start-Job -ScriptBlock {
                    while ($true) {
                      $null = 1 -bnot 1
                    }
                  }
                }
                Start-Sleep -Seconds ({{ DurationMinutes }} * 60)
                $jobs | ForEach-Object { Receive-Job $_ -Wait; Stop-Job $_ -PassThru | Remove-Job }

  FISRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: fis.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /service-role/
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FISPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ec2:StartInstances
                  - ec2:StopInstances
                  - ec2:RebootInstances
                  - ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus
                Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  EC2InstancePrivateDnsName:
    Description: Private DNS name of the EC2 instance for SSM access
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PrivateDnsName
  CpuStressDocumentName:
    Description: Name of the custom SSM document
    Value: !Ref CpuStressDocument
  CpuStressDocumentArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom SSM document
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:document/${CpuStressDocument}'
  FISRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the FIS service role
    Value: !GetAtt FISRole.Arn
  PublicSubnetId:
    Description: ID of the public subnet
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template creating four tiered IAM roles for AWS FIS access controls: SecurityAdmin (full access), Admin (full minus prod), User (granular minus prod), NonUser (FIS deny), all with ReadOnlyAccess and MFA-required assume.'

Parameters: {}

Resources:
  SecurityAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityAdminRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:AssumeRoleWithSAML
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FISSecurityAdminPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: FISFullAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: FISServiceLinkedRole
                Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'iam:AWSServiceName': fis.amazonaws.com
              - Sid: WorkshopRolePassing
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sts:AssumeRole
                  - sts:SetSourceIdentity
                  - sts:TagSession
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:ResourceTag/Workshop': 'true'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FISAccessControl

  AdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AdminRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:AssumeRoleWithSAML
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FISAdminPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: FISFullAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: FISServiceLinkedRole
                Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'iam:AWSServiceName': fis.amazonaws.com
              - Sid: WorkshopRolePassing
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sts:AssumeRole
                  - sts:SetSourceIdentity
                  - sts:TagSession
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:ResourceTag/Workshop': 'true'
              - Sid: ProdDeny
                Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:ResourceTag/Environment': prod
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FISAccessControl

  UserRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:AssumeRoleWithSAML
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FISUserPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: FISReadAndExecute
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - fis:ListActions
                  - fis:ListExperimentTemplates
                  - fis:ListExperiments
                  - fis:GetAction
                  - fis:GetExperiment
                  - fis:GetExperimentTemplate
                  - fis:StartExperiment
                  - fis:StopExperiment
                  - fis:TagResource
                  - fis:UntagResource
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: WorkshopRolePassing
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sts:AssumeRole
                  - sts:SetSourceIdentity
                  - sts:TagSession
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:ResourceTag/Workshop': 'true'
              - Sid: ProdDeny
                Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:ResourceTag/Environment': prod
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FISAccessControl

  NonUserRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NonUserRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:AssumeRoleWithSAML
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FISNonUserPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: FISDeny
                Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FISAccessControl

Outputs:
  SecurityAdminRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of Security Admin role for full FIS access'
    Value: !GetAtt SecurityAdminRole.Arn
  AdminRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of Admin role for FIS access excluding prod environments'
    Value: !GetAtt AdminRole.Arn
  UserRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of User role for limited FIS operations excluding prod environments'
    Value: !GetAtt UserRole.Arn
  NonUserRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of Non-User role with FIS access denied'
    Value: !GetAtt NonUserRole.Arn
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-057c5949' on aws", 'iac-god-eval-057c5949: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - User Initiated', 'AdminRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'NonUserRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SecurityAdminRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'UserRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SecurityAdminRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'AdminRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'NonUserRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'UserRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'SecurityAdminRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'NonUserRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'AdminRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'UserRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-057c5949: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  Stage:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - PROD
      - CODE
    Default: CODE
Conditions:
  IsProd: !Equals [!Ref Stage, PROD]
Resources:
  Table:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub SupporterProductData-${Stage}
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: supporterId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: productId
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: supporterId
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: productId
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: !If [IsProd, PROVISIONED, PAY_PER_REQUEST]
      ProvisionedThroughput: !If
        - IsProd
        - ReadCapacityUnits: 20
          WriteCapacityUnits: 5
        - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      SSESpecification:
        Enabled: true
        SSEType: AWS_OWNED
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        AttributeName: expiryDate
        Enabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Stage
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: Backup
          Value: Enabled
  ScalableTarget:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      MaxCapacity: 500
      MinCapacity: 5
      ResourceId: !Sub table/${Table}
      ScalableDimension: dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits
      ServiceNamespace: dynamodb
  ScalingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub ${Table}-WriteAutoScaling
      PolicyType: TargetTrackingScaling
      ScalingTargetId: !Ref ScalableTarget
      PredefinedMetricSpecification:
        PredefinedMetricType: DynamoDBWriteCapacityUtilization
      TargetValue: 70.0
Outputs:
  TableName:
    Value: !Ref Table
  TableArn:
    Value: !GetAtt Table.Arn
  StreamArn:
    Value: !GetAtt Table.StreamArn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to create an AWS EC2 IPAM instance with default private and public scopes for IP address management and allocation.'

Resources:
  IPAM:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::IPAM'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: IPAM for managing IP address allocation
      OperatingRegions:
        - !Ref 'AWS::Region'
      PubliclyAdvertisable: true
      PublicOpenStatus: closed
      DefaultResourceTags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IPAM'

  PrivateScope:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::IPAMScope'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      IpamId: !Ref IPAM
      Description: Default private scope
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateScope'
        - Key: ScopeType
          Value: private

  PublicScope:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::IPAMScope'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      IpamId: !Ref IPAM
      Description: Default public scope
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicScope'
        - Key: ScopeType
          Value: public

Outputs:
  IPAMId:
    Description: 'IPAM ID for cross-stack VPC/subnet references'
    Value: !Ref IPAM
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IPAMId'

  IPAMArn:
    Description: 'IPAM ARN for policy and integration references'
    Value: !GetAtt IPAM.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IPAMArn'

  PrivateScopeId:
    Description: 'Default private IPAM scope ID for pool creation'
    Value: !Ref PrivateScope
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateScopeId'

  PublicScopeId:
    Description: 'Default public IPAM scope ID for public IP management'
    Value: !Ref PublicScope
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicScopeId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates three IAM managed policies: S3 access for iOS app bucket, DynamoDB protection (deny delete/update table), and RDS protection (deny delete instance/cluster).'

Resources:
  S3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3AccessPolicy'
      Description: 'Grants an iOS application read/write access to the S3 bucket ios-apps.sagebridge.org, including object operations (upload, download, delete) and bucket listing/location permissions.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org/*'

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBProtectionPolicy'
      Description: 'Explicitly denies deletion or schema-modification actions (e.g., DeleteTable, UpdateTable) to prevent accidental data loss in DynamoDB.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - dynamodb:DeleteTable
              - dynamodb:UpdateTable
            Resource: '*'

  RDSProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSProtectionPolicy'
      Description: 'Blocks destructive RDS operations (e.g., DeleteDBInstance, DeleteDBCluster) to safeguard databases and backups.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - rds:DeleteDBInstance
              - rds:DeleteDBCluster
            Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  S3AccessPolicyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 Access Managed Policy for iOS app bucket operations'
    Value: !Ref S3AccessPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3AccessPolicyArn'

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DynamoDB Protection Managed Policy (denies DeleteTable/UpdateTable)'
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBProtectionPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn'

  RDSProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the RDS Protection Managed Policy (denies DeleteDBInstance/DeleteDBCluster)'
    Value: !Ref RDSProtectionPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSProtectionPolicyArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an IAM role for the Bedrock service to assume within the same AWS account, scoped to Bedrock agent resources (agent/*), granting permissions to invoke any Bedrock foundation model and trigger Lambda functions for custom logic integration.'

Resources:
  BedrockAgentServiceRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BedrockAgentServiceRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'bedrock.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:agent/*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BedrockAgentPermissions'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'bedrock:InvokeModel'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'lambda:InvokeFunction'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:*'

Outputs:
  BedrockAgentServiceRoleArn:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for an encrypted S3 bucket for ALB access logs with private access, enforced ownership, 90-day retention, and compliant bucket policy.

Resources:
  ALBAccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb-access-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: AutoDeleteOldLogs
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ALBAccessLogsBucket'

  ALBAccessLogsBucketOwnershipControls:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketOwnershipControls
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
      Rules:
        - BucketOwnerEnforced: true

  ALBAccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowELBLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: 'arn:aws:iam::127311923021:root'
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/AWSLogs/*'
          - Sid: AllowDeliveryLogsToPutObject
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': 'bucket-owner-full-control'
          - Sid: AllowDeliveryLogsToGetBucketAcl
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: 's3:GetBucketAcl'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': 'bucket-owner-full-control'

Outputs:
  ALBAccessLogsBucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the ALB Access Logs Bucket for configuration reference'
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ALBAccessLogsBucketArn'

  ALBAccessLogsBucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the ALB Access Logs Bucket for configuration reference'
    Value: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ALBAccessLogsBucketName'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Transit Gateway with RAM sharing for cross-account connectivity'

Parameters:
  TargetAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '644519422710'
    AllowedPattern: '^[0-9]{12}$'
    Description: 'AWS account ID to share the Transit Gateway with'

Resources:
  TransitGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::TransitGateway
    Properties:
      AmazonSideAsn: 65000
      AutoAcceptSharedAttachments: enable
      DefaultRouteTableAssociation: enable
      DefaultRouteTablePropagation: enable
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  TransitGatewayShare:
    Type: AWS::RAM::ResourceShare
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-tgw-share'
      Principals:
        - !Ref TargetAccountId
      ResourceArns:
        - !GetAtt TransitGateway.TransitGatewayArn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

Outputs:
  TransitGatewayId:
    Description: 'Transit Gateway ID for VPC attachments'
    Value: !Ref TransitGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TransitGatewayId'

  ResourceShareId:
    Description: 'RAM Resource Share ID for cross-account TGW access'
    Value: !Ref TransitGatewayShare
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ResourceShareId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure, cost-optimized S3 bucket for CloudWatch export data storage with configurable versioning and automated lifecycle management.

Parameters:
  EnableVersioning:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended
    Default: Enabled
    Description: Enable or suspend versioning on the S3 bucket.
  TransitionDaysToIA:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 30
    Description: Days after which to transition objects to STANDARD_IA storage class.
  ExpirationDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365
    MinValue: 1
    Description: Days after which to expire current versions of objects.
  NoncurrentVersionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    MinValue: 1
    Description: Days after which to expire noncurrent versions of objects (if versioning enabled).

Resources:
  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cwexport-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !Ref EnableVersioning
      ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
        - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
            SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Status: Enabled
            Expiration:
              Days: !Ref ExpirationDays
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionDaysToIA
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
            NoncurrentVersionExpiration: !If
              - !Equals
                  - !Ref EnableVersioning
                  - Enabled
              - NoncurrentDays: !Ref NoncurrentVersionDays
              - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchExportData
  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTransportSecurity
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${Bucket}'
              - !Sub '${Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowCWLogsPutObject
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
          - Sid: AllowCWLogsGetBucketAcl
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 's3:GetBucketAcl'
            Resource: !Sub '${Bucket}'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for CloudWatch export data
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
  BucketDomainName:
    Description: Domain name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt Bucket.DomainName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates a publicly accessible S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts with customer-managed KMS encryption key and alias.

Parameters:
  ServiceRoleArn:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: "^arn:(aws[a-zA-Z-]*):iam::\\d{12}:role/[a-zA-Z0-9/_+=,.@@-]+$"
    Description: ARN of the imported service role for KMS key usage.

Resources:
  LambdaArtifactsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName:
        Fn::Lower:
          Fn::Sub: "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-lambda-artifacts-${AWS::StackName}"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: false
        BlockPublicPolicy: false
        IgnorePublicAcls: false
        RestrictPublicBuckets: false
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: ObjectWriter
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KMSKey

  LambdaArtifactsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:GetObject"
            Resource: !Sub "${LambdaArtifactsBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:SecureTransport": true

  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Description: !Sub "KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} S3 encryption"
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root account admin access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: Allow service role key usage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref ServiceRoleArn
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: "*"

  KMSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName:
        Fn::Lower:
          Fn::Sub: alias/${AWS::StackName}-lambda-artifacts-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KMSKey

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'IAM Role for AWS Service Catalog to provision S3 and Lambda resources securely'

Resources:
  ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: 'ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'servicecatalog.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3FullAccess'
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSLambdaExecute'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'ServiceCatalogProvisioningInlinePolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'servicecatalog:ProvisionProduct'
                  - 'servicecatalog:TerminateProvisionedProduct'
                  - 'servicecatalog:SearchProducts'
                  - 'servicecatalog:DescribeProductView'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'iam:CreateRole'
                  - 'iam:DeleteRole'
                  - 'iam:UpdateRole'
                  - 'iam:AttachRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:DetachRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:PutRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:DeleteRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:PassRole'
                  - 'iam:GetRole'
                  - 'iam:ListRoles'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'lambda:CreateFunction'
                  - 'lambda:UpdateFunctionCode'
                  - 'lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration'
                  - 'lambda:DeleteFunction'
                  - 'lambda:ListFunctions'
                  - 'lambda:GetFunction'
                  - 'lambda:InvokeFunction'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:CreateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStacks'
                  - 'cloudformation:UpdateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:DeleteStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:ValidateTemplate'
                  - 'cloudformation:ListStacks'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'sns:CreateTopic'
                  - 'sns:DeleteTopic'
                  - 'sns:Subscribe'
                  - 'sns:Unsubscribe'
                  - 'sns:Publish'
                  - 'sns:GetTopicAttributes'
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: 'ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole'
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'SecureResourceProvisioning'

Outputs:
  ServiceCatalogProvisioningRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Service Catalog Provisioning Role for integration'
    Value: !GetAtt 'ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole.Arn'

Description: |-
  This template enables Security Hub with default standards (AWS Foundational Security Best Practices v1.0.0 and CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark v1.2.0).

      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityHub'

    Value: !Ref SecurityHubHub

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for EC2 Image Builder IAM roles, instance profile, and S3 logs bucket.

Resources:
  ImageBuilderInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ImageBuilderOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:CreateTags
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: S3LogsAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}'

  ImageBuilderInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref ImageBuilderInstanceRole

  ImageBuilderLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-ib-logs'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au

  ImageBuilderLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ImageBuilderLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedPut
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': AES256

Outputs:
  ImageBuilderInstanceProfileArn:
    Description: ARN of the Image Builder Instance Profile for pipeline integration
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBuilderInstanceProfile.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ImageBuilderInstanceProfileArn'
  ImageBuilderLogsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the Image Builder Logs Bucket for pipeline integration
    Value: !Ref ImageBuilderLogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ImageBuilderLogsBucketName'
  ImageBuilderInstanceRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Image Builder Instance Role for pipeline integration
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBuilderInstanceRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ImageBuilderInstanceRoleArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Provisions an S3 bucket for VPC flow logs with encryption, versioning, lifecycle rules, and restricted bucket policy.
Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: vpc-flow-logs
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9\-]+$'
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name to ensure uniqueness.
  VersioningStatus:
    Type: String
    Default: Enabled
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended
    Description: Versioning status for the S3 bucket.
  DaysToGlacier:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 3650
    Description: Number of days after which to transition objects to Glacier.
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365000
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 3650000
    Description: Retention period in days after which to delete objects.
Resources:
  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !Ref VersioningStatus
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: FlowLogsLifecycle
            Status: Enabled
            Filter:
              Prefix: !Sub 'AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*'
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref DaysToGlacier
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            Expiration:
              Days: !Ref RetentionDays
            NoncurrentVersionExpiration:
              NoncurrentDays: !Ref RetentionDays
  FlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub '${FlowLogsBucket}/AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for VPC flow logs.
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket for VPC flow logs.
    Value: !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn'
  BucketVersioningStatus:
    Description: Versioning status of the S3 bucket.
    Value: !Ref VersioningStatus
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketVersioningStatus'
